title: Stellaris Extra
body:
# Main info:
I want to make Stellaris bigger and the first version is small but i will make a mod which contain more content then now. Now mod just in beta.**I want to improve almost the all blocks and planets in the future.**


##  Features :
- **New crafts.**\
 _(solar panel, rocket engine, and others)_
- **New items.**\
  _(photovoltaic cell, steel bar, steel plate, and others)_
- **New tools,weapons.**\
  _(desh tools)_
- **New achievements.**

**Addon will improve most of all things in the main mod and make gameplay more advanced. 
The mod now like a small extra plugin and upgrades feels like a small extra features.**

## Extra info
Mod can contains errors!\
Mod will be bigger!

Avaible on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stellaris-extra)!

### Solar panel:
